subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! My peace and My glory rest upon thee. In truth, fairness hath ceased to exist, and oppression is readily apparent
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک سلامی و بهائی فی‌الحقیقه انصاف مفقود و اعتساف مشهود از هر جهتی نار ظلم مشتعل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @silence; fewness of words, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
